creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
After updating libevent2 to 2.0.11 PORTREVISION has been bumped for transmission-cli and some other, but not for transmission-daemon.

$ ldd /usr/local/bin/transmission-daemon | grep libevent
	libevent-2.0.so.5 => not found (0x0)
$ pkg_info -W /usr/local/bin/transmission-daemon
/usr/local/bin/transmission-daemon was installed by package transmission-daemon-2.22
